docs:
# Gradient Mesh
Animated color blobs that blend into a living mesh backdrop.
## Import
```tsx
import { GradientMesh } from "@/components/ui/gradient-mesh";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<GradientMesh colorFrom="#a855f7" colorTo="#22d3ee" speed={1} count={undefined} color={undefined} speed={1} />
```
## Props
- **colorFrom** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: From
- **colorTo** (string) — default: `"#22d3ee"`: To
- **speed** (number) — default: `1`: Speed
- **count** (number): Beam count
- **color** (string): Color
- **speed** (number) — default: `1`: Speed
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add gradient-mesh
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/gradient-mesh
```
